scripts.final-check: pnpm run final-check:install && pnpm run final-check:secret-scan && pnpm run final-check:ledger-guard && pnpm run final-check:sync && pnpm run final-check:verify
scripts.final-check:sync: cd apps/web && pnpm exec svelte-kit sync
scripts.final-check:verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run check && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.seed: cd apps/ingest && pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply vault-db --local && pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute vault-db --local --file ../../tools/seed/vault-seed.sql && cd ../../apps/tg-bot && pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply bot-db --local && pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute bot-db --local --file ../../tools/seed/bot-seed.sql
scripts.deploy: pnpm run deploy:migrations && pnpm run deploy:workers && pnpm run deploy:frontend
scripts.deploy:migrations: pnpm --filter vault-ingest exec wrangler d1 migrations apply vault-db --remote && pnpm --filter tg-bot exec wrangler d1 migrations apply bot-db --remote
